summary: All new features tested and working: Test Tools page with TEST MODE ACTIVE banner and fake users, Admin Reports page with Ban/Dismiss buttons, enhanced Notifications page with Activity/Requests tabs, and Settings page Developer section links.
passed_tests: API /api/test/status returns is_test_mode: true (IS_TEST_BUILD=true in backend/.env)
API /api/test/fake-users returns 4 fake users (Sophie, Liam, Mia, Alex)
API /api/test/generate-glance generates fake glance notification
API /api/test/generate-drink generates fake drink offer
API /api/test/generate-message generates fake message
API /api/admin/reports returns reports list (requires authentication)
API /api/notifications returns notifications list
API /api/chat-requests/inbox returns chat requests
API /api/chat-requests/decline-messages returns 5 predefined decline messages
API /api/chat-requests/accept-messages returns 6 predefined accept messages
API /api/report/reasons returns report reasons including Harassment, Fake profile, Safety concern
Test Tools page (/test-tools) shows TEST MODE ACTIVE banner when IS_TEST_BUILD=true
Test Tools page shows Generate Glance button (data-testid='generate-glance-btn')
Test Tools page shows Generate Drink Offer button (data-testid='generate-drink-btn')
Test Tools page shows Generate Message button (data-testid='generate-message-btn')
Test Tools page displays 4 fake users with avatars, names, ages, and distances
Admin Reports page (/admin/reports) loads with admin-reports-page container
Admin Reports page shows reports with Ban User and Dismiss buttons
Admin Reports page shows report status badges (Pending/Resolved)
Notifications page (/notifications) shows Activity and Requests tabs
Notifications page Activity tab (data-testid='tab-notifications') works
Notifications page Requests tab (data-testid='tab-requests') works
Settings page shows Developer section with Test Tools and Admin Inbox links
Settings page Test Tools link (data-testid='test-tools-link') navigates to /test-tools
Settings page Admin Inbox link (data-testid='admin-reports-link') navigates to /admin/reports

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and flows working correctly

test_credentials.note: New users can be registered with any email/password combination

seed_data_creation: None needed - used dynamic test user creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Test Tools, Admin Reports, enhanced Notifications) are working correctly. Backend IS_TEST_BUILD=true is set in /app/backend/.env enabling test mode features. Test Tools page displays fake users (Sophie, Liam, Mia, Alex) and allows generating test glances, drinks, and messages. Admin Reports page shows user reports with moderation actions. Notifications page now has Activity and Requests tabs for better organization.
